title: cleome hochstetteri
intro: Cleome hochstetteri, also known as Hochstetter's spiderflower, is a plant species in the Cleomaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleome hochstetteri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Cleome hochstetteri is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil for its herbal preparations.
